case_title: OSEMWENGIE, MARTIN N. VS (CAL. TRANS) C/O DONNEL/STATE BOARD OF CONTROL et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY OSEMWENGIE, MARTIN N. AS TO DEFENDANT (CAL. TRANS) C/O DONNEL/STATE BOARD OF CONTROL CLAIM DEPT. MAILING: C/O CHARLES MITCHELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSEMWENGIE, MARTIN N. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT (CAL. TRANS) C/O DONNEL/STATE BOARD OF CONTROL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,021.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
